title: SammyPew's War Pack
body:
![A text "SammyPew's War Pack" infront of a sunset with a planing flying in the bakground.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fdeeb033cba7d4fb4e85ad0b464afd32bfc6410.jpeg)



![The text "FEATURES" infront of a blue ocean at dawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a882f0986800c1aaed56f3f046e7dcf4c81f1683.jpeg)

✔️ 90+ Mods

✔️ Vic's Point Blank for the Weapons

✔️ Immersive Aircrafts for the Planes

✔️ Overhauled Terrain Generation

✔️ Numerous Performance Enchancing Mods

✔️ Wide Variety of new Blocks to Build Military like Bases.

✔️ Alex's Mobs and Cave's for Mobs and Nukes

✔️ Artillery Support

✔️ QoL Features

✔️ And Much More!
